text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin isn't here today either.

I hear that she hasn't been seen around the
academy for some time.

While I'm worried about her, she's still the only
one who can decide whether she'll continue to
race or not.
So...
choice_data_list: (I'm going to wait here for you.)
(I'm going to wait here for you.)

text_block_list.text: I always have and always will believe in her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (What should I do now?)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh... Taishiiiin! You have a visitor!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket... What's gotten into—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come with me! Now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The heck? You want me to watch a basketball
game?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I suuure do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There's a player I've been following lately, and
she's in the starting five in today's game! It's been
ages since she started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know you like sports, but did you have
to drag me into this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I get really energized when I watch sports. Like
all, "Yaaah!" Fired up, y'know what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So, well... I figured if you watched too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You could feel like me and get all... YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. Okay, I get you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll watch the game, so stop yelling already.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay, Taishin! Hehe! I'll turn on the TV!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm pretty sure I've seen that player with the red
hair before.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Count that basket! With her eleventh
three-pointer, she nails the buzzer-beater and
clinches the game for her team!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! That was so, so, so amazing! Woooow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that, Taishin?! The girl with the red
hair was incredible, right?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
She didn't seem to be doing well last year, but
then she suddenly got super good this spring!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This spring?)

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on! No one's rooting for you! No
one thinks you can win!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make you want to give up? Most
people would...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's the postgame interview—they're gonna
talk to her!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: You were amazing on the court!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm glad my training paid off.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
We heard that you'd been struggling for some
time—did something snap you out of it?

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm a basketball player, but I wasn't blessed
with height, as you can see.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I was getting left behind because of my stature,
and I was in a pretty bad place this spring.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to give it all up since I figured no one
expected anything of me, but...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Someone gave me the courage not to give up.
Her way of thinking's a bit odd, but she's not a
quitter. She's stronger than anyone I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (It's her...)

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
We don't play the same sport, but she's the
athlete I admire the most.

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided to show the world who I
really am—no matter how weak or pathetic they
might see me!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: I want to be proud to show everyone the real me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaah! That's sooo touching!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What is that? Some passive-aggressive jab at me?
"Ooh, look at her! She's so small, but she's trying!
What an inspiration!" Ugh.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're wrong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You refuse to lose even when the odds are
against you, and you never give up no matter how
tough things are!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Your determination is what makes you so cool!
You really inspire and encourage me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
At least, that's what I've always thought about
you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're not my rival because you're small!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're my rival because you're you!

I can't even count the number of times I've
flip-flopped between leaving or waiting a little
longer for Narita Taishin.
But just as the sun begins to set... she appears.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Have you been here this whole time?
choice_data_list: ...Yeah.
...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You mean, like, every day?
choice_data_list: Yeah.
Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why do you have so much faith in me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You've been like that ever since you scouted me,
even though I don't have the slightest bit of faith
in myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I just don't know what to do anymore. I...
choice_data_list: Do you want to quit?
Do you want to quit?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Choosing not to race is a noble choice too.
Choosing not to race is a noble choice too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No! I don't want to give up! As if I'd do that right
now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I don't know what to do! I'm not proud of who
I am! I just see someone revoltingly pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to believe that I'm fine the
way I am—that I can continue to race like this?
There's no way!
choice_data_list:
If you can't believe in yourself, then I'll just
double my faith in you!

If you can't believe in yourself, then I'll just
double my faith in you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Lay all your insecurities on me!
Lay all your insecurities on me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-all of them?
choice_data_list:
I'll keep reassuring you until you believe in
yourself!

I'll keep reassuring you until you believe in
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what the heck? What are you even
saying right now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, I've come this far, but my mindset hasn't
changed at all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why would you double your faith to cover for
me? What if you're stuck with that crap forever?
choice_data_list: I don't care how long it takes!
I don't care how long it takes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What if it takes your entire lifetime, stupid?!
choice_data_list: I'd still do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you'd agree to believe in me for
your entire life.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You really are an idiot.

Narita Taishin says that she'll try running a little
more.

Her decision made, we begin to talk about our
next race.

There's one I want to suggest that might help her
gain a more positive outlook on things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The Nikkei Sho?
choice_data_list:
It's held at Nakayama Racecourse, just like the
Satsuki Sho.

It's held at Nakayama Racecourse, just like the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is where Narita Taishin left her
mark on the world—where everyone finally
recognized her abilities.

I put forward the idea of racing again at the place
she had her major turning point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give it a shot.
choice_data_list: Really?
Really?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll go with you again... and try.
